description: Upgrade plan to migrate project to latest LTS versions

tasks.description: Upgrade to Java 21 and Spring Boot 3.4
tasks.requirements: Upgrade JDK to 21, Spring Boot to 3.4, Spring Framework to 6.x, migrate javax.* to jakarta.* namespace, update dependencies to compatible versions, and resolve any deprecations
tasks.taskSummary: Successfully upgraded to Java 21 and Spring Boot 3.4.3. Updated pom.xml with Java 21 and Spring Boot 3.4.3. Migrated javax.persistence.* and javax.validation.* to jakarta.* namespace in Photo.java. Added spring.jpa.open-in-view=false to application.properties. Removed explicit H2Dialect from test properties (auto-detected in Hibernate 6). Build succeeded and all unit tests pass.
